message:
test(repair): add ~49 edge-case tests across symbol, scrub, lrc, and evidence modules

symbol: RepairParseError Display, clone/eq, max-value roundtrips,
  insufficient data, checksum mismatch, compute_repair_block_count edge cases.
scrub: CorruptionKind/Severity Display, Hash, empty report, copy semantics.
lrc: LrcConfig validation, GF(256) associativity/inv(0), XOR parity identity.
evidence: EvidenceEventType all-variants serde, TxnAbortReason serde,
  block_range in JSON, empty/blank ledger parsing, Partial outcome mapping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
